expectations.text: Recommends adding to ignored_columns before dropping, even if column appears unreferenced
expectations.evidence: Deploy 1 adds self.ignored_columns += ["legacy_notes"] to the model as the safety net regardless of whether code explicitly references it.

expectations.text: Explains that ActiveRecord caches column names at startup (the reason for ignored_columns)
expectations.evidence: Explicitly explains AR caches the column list at process startup; old processes raise ActiveRecord::UnknownAttributeError even if code never names the column.

expectations.text: Shows the migration with safety_assured { remove_column }
expectations.evidence: Shows safety_assured { remove_column :contacts, :legacy_notes } with explanation of correct use after Deploy 1.

expectations.text: Describes a 2-deploy sequence (deploy ignored_columns, then drop column)
expectations.evidence: Deploy 1 (ignored_columns + remove references, fully roll out) and Deploy 2 (drop the column) clearly separated.

expectations.text: Mentions removing the ignored_columns entry after the column is dropped
expectations.evidence: After the migration runs in production, remove the self.ignored_columns line from the model in a follow-up commit.

eval_feedback.overall: Fully satisfies all five expectations. Adds valuable extras: grep verification steps, reversibility note for remove_column type argument.
